recommendations.title: A Matter of Life and Death
recommendations.overview: A British wartime aviator who cheats death must argue for his life before a celestial court, hoping to prolong his fledgling romance with an American girl.

recommendations.title: The Red Shoes
recommendations.overview: A fledgling ballerina falls in love with a brilliant composer, but the jealous head of the ballet company plots to drive them apart.

recommendations.title: A Canterbury Tale
recommendations.overview: Three modern-day pilgrims investigate a bizarre crime in a small town while on their way to Canterbury.

recommendations.title: Peeping Tom

recommendations.title: The Life and Death of Colonel Blimp
recommendations.overview: General Candy, who's overseeing an English squad in 1943, is a veteran leader who doesn't have the respect of the men he's training and is considered out-of-touch with what's needed to win the war. But it wasn't always this way. Flashing back to his

recommendations.title: I Know Where I'm Going!
recommendations.overview: Plucky Englishwoman Joan Webster travels to the remote islands of the Scottish Hebrides in order to marry a wealthy industrialist. Trapped by inclement weather on the Isle of Mull and unable to continue to her destination, Joan finds herself charmed

recommendations.title: The Thief of Bagdad
recommendations.overview: A recalcitrant thief vies with a duplicitous Mongol ruler for the hand of a beautiful princess.

recommendations.title: Black Narcissus
recommendations.overview: A group of Anglican nuns, led by Sister Clodagh, are sent to a mountain in the Himalayas. The climate in the region is hostile and the nuns are housed in an odd old palace. They work to establish a school and a hospital, but slowly their focus shifts

recommendations.title: 49th Parallel
recommendations.overview: In the early days of World War II, a German U-boat is sunk in Canada's Hudson Bay. Hoping to evade capture, a small band of German soldiers led by commanding officer Lieutenant Hirth attempts to cross the border into the United States, which has not

recommendations.title: Wonder Woman
recommendations.overview: An Amazon princess comes to the world of Man in the grips of the First World War to confront the forces of evil and bring an end to human conflict.
